briefdescription.para: This API enables the master tile sysref Tx/Rx.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
the master tile sysref for Tx/Rx, valid values are 0 and 1.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Is_PLL, u32 Enable_Cap, u32 Enable_Div_Reset)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MTS_Sysref_Ctrl

briefdescription.para: This API Control SysRef Capture Settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
Valid values are 0 and 1.
Valid values are 0 and 1.
Valid values are 0 and 1.

briefdescription.para: This API Update SysRef Distribution between tiles.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is number of DAC tiles

briefdescription.para: This API Wait for a number of sysref's to be captured.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
to wait for a number of sysref's to be captured.

briefdescription.para: This API Scan the DTC codes and determine the optimal capture code for both PLL and T1 cases.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
dtc settings structure.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 BaseAddr, u32 SRCtrlAddr, u32 DTCAddr, u16 SRctl, u16 SRclr_m, u32 Code)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MTS_Dtc_Code

briefdescription.para: This API Set a DTC code and wait for it to be updated.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
is for internal usage.
is for internal usage.
is for internal usage.
is for internal usage.
is for internal usage.
is for internal usage.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, XRFdc_MTS_DTC_Settings *SettingsPtr, u8 *FlagsPtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MTS_Dtc_Calc

briefdescription.para: This API Calculate the best DTC code to use.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
dtc settings structure.
is for internal usage.

listitem.para: XRFDC_MTS_NOT_SUPPORTED if MTS is not supported.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 *FlagsPtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 Target, u32 Picked)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MTS_Dtc_Flag_Debug

briefdescription.para: This API print the DTC scan results.

parameterdescription.para: is for internal usage.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is for internal usage.
is for internal usage.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 FIFO_Mode, u32 Tiles_To_Clear)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MTS_FIFOCtrl

briefdescription.para: This API Control the FIFO enable for the group.

detaileddescription.para: If Tiles_to_clear has bits set, the FIFOs of those tiles will have their FIFO flags cleared.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
is fifo mode.
bits set, FIFO flags will be cleared for those tiles.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tiles, XRFdc_MTS_Marker *MarkersPtr, int Marker_Delay)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MTS_GetMarker

briefdescription.para: This API Run the marker counter and read the results.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
is tiles to get marker
mts marker structure.
is marker delay.

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u32 FIFO_Id, u32 *CountPtr, u32 *LocPtr, u32 *DonePtr)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_MTS_Marker_Read

briefdescription.para: This API Read-back the marker data for an ADC or DAC.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
is FIFO number.
is for internal usage.
is for internal usage.
is for internal usage.

briefdescription.para: This API Calculate the absolute/relative latencies.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
is mts config structure.
is mts marker structure.

simplesect.para: Latency calculation will use Sysref frequency counters logic which will work with IP version 2.0.1 and above.

briefdescription.para: This API Scans the DTC codes and determine the optimal capture code for PLL cases.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Valid values are 0-3.
dtc settings structure.

briefdescription.para: This API is used to enable/disable the sysref.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is pointer to DAC Multi-Tile Sync config structure.
is pointer to ADC Multi-Tile Sync config structure.
valid values are 0(disable) and 1(enable).

briefdescription.para: This API Initializes the multi-tile sync config structures.

detaileddescription.para: Optionally allows target codes to be provided for the Pll/T1 analog sysref capture

parameterdescription.para: pointer to Multi-tile sync config structure.
pointer to PLL analog sysref capture.
pointer to T1 analog sysref capture.
the tile ID of the reference tile.

listitem.para: XRFDC_MTS_BAD_REF_TILE if bad reference tile value is supplied.

briefdescription.para: This is the top level API which will be used for Multi-tile Synchronization.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC
Multi-tile sync config structure.

listitem.para:
XRFDC_MTS_TIMEOUT if timeout occurs.
XRFDC_MTS_MARKER_RUN
XRFDC_MTS_MARKER_MISM
XRFDC_MTS_NOT_SUPPORTED if MTS is not supported.

briefdescription.para: This is the top level API which will be used to check if Multi-tile is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
to be filled with the enable state.

briefdescription.para: Get Master Tile for ADC/DAC tiles.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC

listitem.para: Return Master Tile for ADC/DAC tiles

briefdescription.para: Get Sysref source for ADC/DAC tile.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
is ADC or DAC. 0 for ADC and 1 for DAC

listitem.para: Return Sysref source for ADC/DAC tile
